name: PhonePe
description: Indias largest UPI payments app with PhonePe Payment Gateway offering merchants checkout APIs, UPI, cards and wallet acceptance.

seo.title: PhonePe — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PhonePe: Indias largest UPI payments app with PhonePe Payment Gateway offering merchants checkout APIs, UPI, cards and wallet acceptance.

when_to_use: UPI checkout integration via PhonePe for Indian merchants
Accepting cards and wallet payments on PhonePe gateway
Recurring UPI AutoPay for Indian subscription services

cons: Gateway feature set narrower than Razorpay
review.verdict: Worth it for UPI-heavy Indian checkout, but Razorpay usually wins as primary gateway for devs.
review.best_for: India merchants optimizing UPI conversion via the PhonePe consumer brand
review.not_for: Teams wanting the richest gateway feature set in India
